controls.expected_rejection: Changed BIPM snapshot identity is rejected.
Changed prediction or trace is rejected.
Target access or forbidden proof value is rejected.
Changed external observation label fails exact comparison.

dimension_unit_boundary.external_reference_protocol: LIGO Scientific Collaboration, Virgo Collaboration and KAGRA Collaboration / Gravitational Wave Open Science Center snapshot sha256:67266a5406cbee1dc98a9853beb42d771595fa474f5ddd33ab4b368d5b71c45d; used only after prediction sealing.

evaluation_protocol.acceptance_condition: Every registered external row matches and the deliberately changed row is rejected.
evaluation_protocol.falsification_condition: The cosmological-boundary law is falsified if a committed external row lacks the sealed propagation/observation relation, a row is omitted, or the tampered row is accepted.

metrics.definition: Compare every registered predicted structural label with its committed external observation label by exact identity.
metrics.unit_protocol: Structural metrology correspondence; external unit inscriptions remain records.

external_measurement_sources.measurement_body: LIGO Scientific Collaboration, Virgo Collaboration and KAGRA Collaboration / Gravitational Wave Open Science Center

frozen_relation.candidate_grammar: Generate the complete emission, propagation, observation-time, source/response, provenance, target-access, successor and extra-rule product.
frozen_relation.exact_domain: All finite cosmological-boundary forms generated from exact source-bound propagation, recurrence ratios, causal paths and observation records; astronomical census and historical initial conditions remain outside this Physics closure.
frozen_relation.statement: Cosmological redshift is an exact source-to-observer Fold recurrence ratio with complete path provenance.

stop_condition: Halt after every registered target and adverse-control row is evaluated once, or immediately on any violation.
